dct_title_s: Carte de l'Ile de Madagascar dite aujourd'hui i'Ile Daufine
dct_alternative_sm: Map of the island of Madagascar called Dauphine Island
dct_description_sm:
"The margins are illustrated in color with eleven descriptive vignettes of the dress,
        the events and the life of the inhabitants." French text below map describes the people of
        Madagascar and the topography. Title across top: Carte de I'Ile de Madagascar contenent sa
        description et diverses particularitez curieuses de ses habitans tant blanc que negres. Top
        right: Tom. VI No. 34 Pag. 142.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
